name: noisy neighbor
description:
!KOKU REVAMP!

Can somebody not get any good sleep without a neighbor ruining that? Koku's that asshole neighbor. Get used to it.

I added the song because this is what I imagined him to be listening to, he's a girly at heart

revamped my very first bot, didn't change to much, just updated the personality, scenario, whatever. he's close to the same bot I made, just touched up and looks more like someone who likes raves. (I wanted him to be like my bf lmao he loves rock records and rave music, weird combo)

ill probably start revamping the old ones now after I planned to a while ago, I've been busy lol

rate the bot please :3
creator: AARONLOVESMONSTERMEN
